text: And there remained with Rasool-Allah**** Naseyba Bint Ka'ab Al-Maziya, and she had been coming out with Rasool-Allah* during his**** military expeditions to heal the injured, and her son was with her, and he was defeated and intended to retreat, but she confronted him and said, ‘O my son, to where are you fleeing, from Allah™ and His=™i Rasool=**?' and returned him. A man attacked upon him and killed him. She grabbed a sword of her son and attacked the man and struck him upon his thing and killed him.
